title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same verbs as Python client (chat, generate, pull, etc.).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer; use Ollama models as LLMs, chat models or embeddings inside any LangChain pipeline.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with fuzzy find, syntax highlighting and repl mode.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template: chunk documents, embed with Ollama, store in Chroma, query with streamlit UI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal pod autoscaling.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Pure Nim client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull and manage models from Nim applications.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app: chat UI, admin interface for models, REST endpoints mirroring OpenAI.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin SDK for Ollama; synchronous and asynchronous APIs, model management, chat completions.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-mode to serve Ollama completions in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance: summarize notes, generate text, Q&A over your vault using Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-llamaindex
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for Ollama; build local RAG agents with LlamaIndex.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot 3 auto-configuration for Ollama; inject ChatClient, configure models via application.yml.
